title: cytisus lotoides
intro: Cytisus lotoides, also known as the Lotus broom or Broom- Lotus, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, and has been used to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory actions that may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cardiovascular disease and certain cancers. In herbal preparations, Cytisus lotoides is often used as a dried extract or in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that support digestive health and overall well-being.
